overall.description: A nighttime scene from the bridge of a ship navigating through stormy waters. The view shows the vessel's bow cutting through dark seas while navigation monitors display radar and chart data, with a lightning flash briefly illuminating the port side. The footage appears to be from a maritime simulation game.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward view of bow and ocean

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface on the port side, briefly revealing the rough sea conditions

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while monitoring radar and chart displays as the vessel proceeds through stormy nighttime waters

entered.detail: navigation display showing green landmasses and blue water with vessel position marked
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm displaying surrounding terrain and contacts
blue-tinted display showing underwater depth profile and sonar readings
triangular bow section of the vessel with red deck plating and white safety railings visible through the forward windows
metal safety railings and structural supports of the bridge interior framing the forward view
dark choppy water surface extending to the horizon with waves visible in the lightning flash

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place inside a ship's bridge at night, looking forward over the bow as the vessel navigates through stormy seas. Three navigation monitors display chart data, radar, and sonar information while the ship moves steadily forward. A lightning strike briefly illuminates the port side ocean surface, revealing rough wave conditions in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from the sheltered interior of a ship's bridge into the volatile atmosphere of a midnight storm. It begins with a view over the bow, where the vessel cuts through dark, churning seas while three navigation monitors glow with chart, radar, and sonar data. As the ship maintains its course, the oppressive darkness is suddenly interrupted by a sharp flash of lightning. This burst of light momentarily illuminates the port side of the ocean, revealing the true scale of the rough wave conditions in the distance before the scene settles back into the deep shadows of the night.
